title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that orchestrates frontier models and integrates access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. It enables researchers to move rapidly from genetic hypothesis to experimental design, demonstrated through investigation of an AK2 gene variant.
